issues.title: Fix file upload timeout on large attachments (>50 MB)
issues.description: Users report upload failures for attachments exceeding 50 MB. Timeout set at 30 s on the nginx proxy layer is too aggressive. Needs investigation into chunked upload support. Customer ACME Corp has escalated to VP of Engineering — SLA expires 2026-06-20.
issues.business_impact: ACME Corp ($2M ARR) threatening churn. VP of Engineering alerted.

issues.title: Authentication token refresh fails silently on mobile clients
issues.description: iOS and Android clients silently drop sessions when refresh tokens expire. Users get logged out without error messages. Affects 12% of mobile DAU. Root cause traced to missing 401 retry handler in the mobile SDK.
issues.business_impact: Impacts 12% mobile DAU — risk of negative app store reviews.

issues.title: Database connection pool exhaustion under peak load
issues.description: PostgreSQL connection pool (max 100 connections) hits ceiling during morning peak hours (09:00–10:00 UTC). New requests queue and time out after 5 seconds. Pool size increase rejected by DBA team without read-replica routing first.
issues.business_impact: Production instability during peak. Oncall triggered 3 times last week.

issues.title: Implement read replica routing for reporting queries
issues.description: All SELECT queries currently hit the primary DB. Routing heavy reporting queries to a read replica will reduce primary load by an estimated 40%. Required prerequisite for JIRA-1003 unblocking.
issues.business_impact: Unblocks P1 JIRA-1003. 40% projected primary DB load reduction.

issues.title: Migrate legacy REST endpoints to GraphQL schema v2
issues.description: 14 legacy REST endpoints still serving deprecated v1 responses. Frontend team blocked on adopting new features until migration is complete. Target: all endpoints migrated by end of sprint.
issues.business_impact: Blocks frontend team velocity. 2 features on hold pending this.

issues.title: Security: Rotate API keys exposed in commit abc1234
issues.description: Automated secret scanner flagged AWS credentials committed to branch feature/analytics-export in commit abc1234 on 2026-06-17. Keys must be rotated immediately. Incident review scheduled for 2026-06-20.
issues.business_impact: Active security exposure. AWS credentials in git history.

issues.title: Add rate limiting to the public API (tier-based)
issues.description: Public API currently has no rate limiting. A partner integration stress test is scheduled for 2026-06-25. Without rate limiting, the test could destabilize production. Implementation: Redis token bucket, 1000 req/min for free tier, 10000 for paid.
issues.business_impact: Partner integration at risk. Production instability if missed.

issues.title: Write integration tests for the payment processing module
issues.description: Payment module has zero integration test coverage. Three bugs in the last sprint were caught in production. QA requires integration tests before the next billing cycle release (2026-06-30).
issues.business_impact: Three production bugs last sprint from untested payment paths.

issues.title: DBA approval: Provision read replica on prod PostgreSQL cluster
issues.description: DBA team (Ivan) must provision and validate the read replica before dev team can configure routing. Ticket owned by DBA. Dev team waiting. ETA from Ivan: 2026-06-19 EOD.
issues.business_impact: Blocks read-replica routing (JIRA-1004) which unblocks P1 JIRA-1003.

issues.title: Implement dark mode support across all dashboard components
issues.description: Product requirement for Q2 OKR. 43 React components need CSS variable updates. Design tokens provided by the design team. Estimated effort: 3 days.
issues.business_impact: Q2 OKR deliverable. Requested in 3 customer feedback sessions.

issues.title: Investigate memory leak in the notification microservice
issues.description: The notification-service Pod restarts every 6–8 hours due to OOM kill. Heap dump analysis shows a listener accumulation pattern in the EventEmitter. Likely a missing removeListener call in the subscription teardown path.
issues.business_impact: Notification delivery delay 6–8h windows. Customer-visible outages.

issues.title: Update file upload UI to show chunked upload progress bar
issues.description: Once JIRA-1001 implements chunked upload on the backend, the frontend must show a progress bar with percentage and estimated time. Blocked on JIRA-1001 backend work.
issues.business_impact: User-visible feature pending P1 backend fix.

issues.title: Audit and patch all third-party dependencies with HIGH CVEs
issues.description: Snyk scan from 2026-06-15 identified 7 npm packages with HIGH severity CVEs. 3 are direct dependencies. Patch must be applied and regression-tested before the next production deploy.
issues.business_impact: 7 HIGH CVEs in production. Compliance violation risk.

issues.title: Build dashboard analytics component using GraphQL v2 schema
issues.description: New analytics dashboard component requires the GraphQL v2 schema to be available. Blocked on JIRA-1005 REST-to-GraphQL migration completing.
issues.business_impact: Analytics dashboard blocked. Product demo scheduled June 26.

issues.title: Migrate notification service to GraphQL subscriptions
issues.description: Real-time notification delivery currently uses polling. Migration to GraphQL subscriptions (WebSocket) depends on GraphQL v2 schema (JIRA-1005).
issues.business_impact: Real-time notification feature blocked on GraphQL migration.

issues.title: Document the new API authentication flow for partner integrations
issues.description: Two partners (PartnerCo and VendorX) are integrating with the new OAuth2 flow. API documentation is incomplete. PM Bob has received complaints from both partner technical leads.
issues.business_impact: Two partner integrations delayed. Partner complaints logged.

issues.title: Reduce average API response latency from 480 ms to under 200 ms
issues.description: P99 API latency at 480 ms. Target SLA is 200 ms. Performance profiling shows the main culprit is an N+1 query pattern in the task list endpoint. DataLoader batching required.
issues.business_impact: API SLA breach. Enterprise contract requires p99 < 200 ms.

issues.title: Add biometric re-authentication for mobile payment actions
issues.description: PCI DSS requirement: payment actions on mobile must require biometric re-authentication (Face ID / fingerprint). Blocked on JIRA-1002 auth token fix being deployed to mobile SDK first.
issues.business_impact: PCI DSS compliance requirement. Non-compliance risk post-June 30.

issues.title: Set up automated database backup verification job
issues.description: Current backup jobs write to S3 but restorability is never verified. Compliance audit in July requires proof of tested restore procedures. Automate a weekly restore-and-verify job.
issues.business_impact: July compliance audit. Unverified backups = audit finding.

issues.title: Localisation: add Spanish and French language support to UI
issues.description: Expanding to LATAM and France markets in Q3. i18n infrastructure exists but Spanish and French translation files are empty. Design team has approved copy.
issues.business_impact: Q3 market expansion. LATAM and France go-live depends on this.

issues.title: Refactor legacy session management to stateless JWT pattern
issues.description: Session store currently backed by Redis with sticky sessions on the load balancer. Horizontal scaling is blocked without migrating to stateless JWTs. This is a multi-sprint effort; initial design doc needed this sprint.
issues.business_impact: Blocks horizontal scaling initiative. Design doc needed this sprint.

issues.title: Review and merge PR #892: Add webhook retry logic
issues.description: PR #892 from dev_george adds exponential backoff for failed webhook deliveries. Waiting on code review from dev_alice. Blocking dev_george's next task.
issues.business_impact: Blocking dev_george. Partner webhooks unreliable without retry.
